judgment.summary: High-growth software business with strong cash flow and liquidity, though trading at a significant valuation premium with thin margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 0.60 beat the 0.51 estimate by 18.3%, with the next earnings date on 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth of 32.2% and earnings growth of 104.0% indicate strong business expansion.
Gross margin of 79.9% shows high profitability at the product level.
Total cash of $4.76B provides a strong liquidity cushion against $1.29B in debt.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $936.73M demonstrates healthy cash generation.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 519.95 reflects an extremely high valuation.
Operating margin of 0.8% and profit margin of 3.7% are very thin.
Price/Sales (TTM) of 20.16x indicates the stock is priced at a significant premium.
Return on assets is negative at -0.2%.

news.paragraph: Datadog has recently experienced a surge in its share price and received positive commentary regarding the quality of its earnings. Following the company's Q1 earnings call, market analysts are actively evaluating the stock's performance and its role within the broader tech and AI sectors. This recent earnings activity serves as a primary recent catalyst for traders monitoring the stock's momentum.
